creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Jacob Myers writes:
> *blush* Sorry it took so long.

No problems.

> I cannot duplicate your build error here I'm afraid. However I did get
> a new build error:

Are you sure ? I mean I've old conspire port installed. And I was trying to
upgrade using usual route.

% sudo make -C /usr/ports/irc/conspire build deinstall package clean

I'd to deinstall existing port, then only I am able to build conspire port
successfully.

Thanks for the reply.
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
